Class-Fighter 20 — Male Human Fighter: 20
Strength: 14 (+2) Dexterity: 13 (+1) Constitution: 13 (+1) Intelligence: 19 (+4) Wisdom: 12 (+1) Charisma: 14 (+2)
Background: Acolyte Alignment: Neutral Evil Deity: FR-Deneir (NG)
Ability Boosts: Charisma; Constitution Experience: 451863/1000000 Level: 20 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 210/420
Ability Notes:
Ability Score Improvement: Ability Boost (Choose 2 from any)
Actor: +1 Charisma
Human Ability Adjustment: +1 Charisma/+1 Constitution/+1 Dexterity/+1 Intelligence/+1 Strength/+1 Wisdom
Linguist: +1 Intelligence
Ability Boosts: 2 to distribute
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +6
Feat Count: General: 7 Selectable Feature Count: Fighter (Arcane Shot): 6; Fighter (Fighting Style): 1; Fighter (Martial Archetype): 1
Feats: Ability Score Improvement; Actor; Great Weapon Master; Linguist; Lucky; Polearm Master; Savage Attacker Human Features: Human Ability Adjustment; Language (Common; Choose 1 from any) Fighter Features: Action Surge; Arcane Archer Lore; Arcane Archer; Arcane Shot; Armor Proficiency (Light; Medium; Heavy; Shield); Banishing Arrow; Beguiling Arrow; Bonus Proficiency (Cavalier); Bonus Proficiency (Samurai); Born To The Saddle; Bursting Arrow; Cavalier; Curving Shot; Elegant Courtier; Enfeebling Arrow; Ever-Ready Shot; Extra Attack; Ferocious Charger; Fighting Spirit; Fighting Style (Archery); Fighting Style; Grasping Arrow; Hold The Line; Indomitable; Magic Arrow; Martial Archetype; Piercing Arrow; Rapid Strike; Samurai; Save Proficiency (Strength; Constitution); Second Wind; Seeking Arrow; Shadow Arrow; Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Acrobatics, Animal Handling, Athletics, History, Insight, Intimidation, Perception, Survival); Strength Before Death; Tireless Spirit; Unwavering Mark; Vigilant Defender; Warding Maneuver; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Martial Weapons) Acolyte Features: Language (Choose 2 from any); Shelter Of The Faithful; Skill Proficiency (Insight; Religion)
Feature Notes:
Arcane Shot: 6 selections
Fighting Style: 1 selection
Martial Archetype: 1 selection
Shelter Of The Faithful: Can receive aid from temples of FR-Deneir and fellow believers
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +7 Insight: (wis) +7 Performance: (cha) +2
Animal Handling: (wis) +7 Intimidation: (cha) +2 Persuasion: (cha) +9
Arcana: (int) +4 Investigation: (int) +4 Religion: (int) +10
Athletics: (str) +2 Medicine: (wis) +1 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +1
Deception: (cha) +2 Nature: (int) +10 Stealth: (dex) +1
History: (int) +10 Perception: (wis) +1 Survival: (wis) +1
Skill Proficiency: Acrobatics; Animal Handling; History; Insight; Nature; Persuasion; Religion
Languages: Common; Deep Speech; Draconic; Dwarvish; Elvish; Goblin; Orc
Skill Notes:
Arcane Archer Lore: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from Arcana, Nature)
Bonus Proficiency (Cavalier): Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from Animal Handling, History, Insight, Performance, Persuasion)
Bonus Proficiency (Samurai): Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from History, Insight, Performance, Persuasion)
Elegant Courtier: +1 Persuasion
Linguist: Language (Choose 3 from any)
Actor: Has advantage on Deception and Performance to impersonate another person and can mimic others' speech or sounds (successful Insight vs. Deception detects)
Born To The Saddle: Has advantage on saves vs. falling off mount, lands on feet after a 10' fall from mount, and dismount and mount each cost only 5' movement
Bulky Armor: Has disadvantage on Stealth
Linguist: Can create ciphers (DC 25 Intelligence to decode)
Combat
Hit Points: 91 Initiative: +1 Armor Class: 16
Armor Proficiency: Heavy; Light; Medium; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Martial Weapons; Simple Weapons
Armor: Half Plate Shield: None Weapons: Greataxe (+8 1d12+2 S); Light Hammer (+8 1d4+2 B R20/60); Rapier (+8 1d8+2 P); Shortbow (+9 1d6+1 P R80/320); Unarmed Strike (+8 1+2 B)
Combat Notes:
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +20
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +1
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +1
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +1
Fighting Style (Archery): +2 attacks with Ranged weapons
Strength Attack Adjustment: +2
Strength Damage Adjustment: +2
Action Surge: Can take an extra action 2 times per short rest
Arcane Shot: Can use an Arcane Shot effect once per turn 2 times per short rest
Banishing Arrow: Arcane Shot arrow inflicts +2d6 HP force and banishment to the Feywild until the end of the target's next turn (save DC 18 Charisma negates banishment)
Beguiling Arrow: Arcane Shot arrow inflicts +4d6 HP psychic, and the target becomes charmed by a chosen ally within 30' (save DC 18 Wisdom negates charm) until the start of the next turn or until the ally attacks or damages the target or forces it to make a save
Bursting Arrow: Successful Arcane Shot arrow attack inflicts +4d6 HP force damage in a 10' radius
Curving Shot: Can use a bonus action to redirect a magic arrow miss to another target within 60'
Enfeebling Arrow: Arcane Shot arrow inflicts +4d6 HP necrotic damage and reduces the damage inflicted by the target's attacks by half until the start of the next turn (save DC 18 Constitution HP only)
Ever-Ready Shot: Has a minimum of 1 Arcane Shot use available after initiative
Extra Attack: Can make 4 attacks during an Attack action
Ferocious Charger: Can knock prone with a hit after a 10' move (save DC 16 Strength negates) once per turn
Fighting Spirit: Can use a bonus action to gain advantage on attacks until the end of the turn and 15 temporary hit points 3 times per long rest
Grasping Arrow: Arcane Shot arrow inflicts +4d6 HP poison damage, -10' Speed, and 4d6 HP slashing per rd upon target move for 1 min (save DC 18 Athletics ends)
Great Weapon Master: Can use a bonus action to attack after scoring a critical hit or reducing a foe to 0 hit points with a melee weapon/Can make a -5 attack with a heavy weapon to inflict +10 damage
Hold The Line: Foe move within reach provokes an opportunity attack; a hit halts the move
Lucky: Can gain advantage on an attack, ability check, or save or inflict foe disadvantage an attack on self 3 times per long rest
Magic Arrow: Can make arrows magical when fired
Piercing Arrow: Arcane Shot arrow passes harmlessly through objects and inflicts +2d6 HP piercing damage (save DC 18 Dexterity half) on creatures in a 30'x1' line
Polearm Master: Can use a bonus action after attacking with a polearm to attack with the opposite end, inflicting 1d4 HP bludgeoning, and can make an opportunity attack against a foe who enters polearm reach
Rapid Strike: Can forego advantage on an attack to gain an extra attack once per turn
Savage Attacker: Can take the better of 2 melee damage rolls once per turn
Second Wind: Can use a bonus action to regain 1d10+20 hit points once per short rest
Seeking Arrow: Arcane Shot arrow finds the specified target, ignoring 3/4 cover, inflicts +2d6 HP force, and reveals the target's location (save DC 18 Dexterity half HP only)
Shadow Arrow: Arcane Shot arrow inflicts +4d6 HP psychic and 5' vision until the start of the next turn (save DC 18 Wisdom HP only)
Strength Before Death: Can take an immediate extra turn when brought to 0 HP once per long rest
Tireless Spirit: Has a minimum 1 Fighting Spirit use available after initiative
Unwavering Mark: A successful attack can mark a foe until the end of the next turn 2 times per long rest; its attacks on others when adjacent to self suffer disadvantage, and damaging others allows self to use a bonus action during the next turn to attack with advantage, inflicting +10 HP weapon damage
Vigilant Defender: Can use a reaction to make an opportunity attack on every other creature's turn
Warding Maneuver: When using a melee weapon or shield, can use a reaction in response to a successful attack on self or an adjacent ally to give the target +1d8 Armor Class and damage resistance once per long rest
Save Proficiency: Constitution; Strength; Wisdom
Save: Charisma: +2; Constitution: +7; Dexterity: +1; Intelligence: +4; Strength: +8; Wisdom: +7
Save Notes:
Elegant Courtier: Save Proficiency (Wisdom)
Indomitable: Can reroll a failed save 3 times per long rest
Magic
Spells:
Druidcraft (Fighter0 [Arcane Archer Lore] Tran): (Action) R30' Predicts 24 hr weather, causes a plant to bloom, creates a minor sensory effect, or lights or snuffs a small fire
Prestidigitation (Fighter0 [Arcane Archer Lore] Tran): (Action) R10' Creates a minor magic effect: a brief, harmless sensory effect; lighting or snuffing a flame; cleaning or soiling a 1' cube; chilling, warming, or flavoring a 1' cube for 1 hr; marking an object for 1 hr; creating a nonmagical trinket or illusion until the end of the next turn
Magic Notes: Arcane Archer Lore: Knows either the Druidcraft or Prestidigitation cantrip
Notes
Validation Errors: Selectable Feature Allocation: 8 available vs. 12 allocated
